game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **艾彼 - 大结局更新 (Abi)** Players control the robot Abi, and sometimes her companion DD, through a post-apocalyptic world filled with environmental puzzles and narrative exploration. Movement is achieved by tapping on the desired location or using a virtual joystick, while interacting with objects or other robots is done via contextual tap prompts. Puzzles often require switching between Abi and DD, utilizing Abi's smaller size to access tight spaces or DD's industrial strength to move heavy objects, with solutions typically involving 2-3 steps of object manipulation or sequence activation. Progression is linear, advancing the story through distinct chapters as players uncover clues about humanity's disappearance and unlock new areas after solving key puzzles. The game concludes upon discovering the final truth in the metropolis, with no explicit failure states beyond being stuck on a puzzle.
game_info.description: Guide Abi, a small robot, and her companion DD through a mysterious post-apocalyptic world. Solve environmental puzzles by switching between characters—use Abi's agility to navigate tight spaces and DD's strength to move heavy objects. Uncover the truth about humanity's disappearance as you progress through distinct chapters, solving 2-3 step puzzles to unlock new areas and advance the story toward the final revelation in the metropolis.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move selected character (Abi or DD)
Space: Switch between Abi and DD
Z: Interact with objects/activate switches
Shift: Sprint (move faster)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and character switching mechanics. Validates that both Abi and DD can move in all directions and that switching between characters works correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move Abi in a pattern covering all directions, then switch to DD and repeat. Test sprint functionality. Verify position changes are correct and character switching updates the active player.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Both characters should move smoothly in all directions. Sprint should increase movement speed. Character switching should update the active character. No errors or stuck states should occur during basic movement.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal gameplay strategy to win the game by completing all puzzles efficiently. Validates that the win condition is achievable through proper puzzle solving and character coordination.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the optimal path through all chapters: Use Abi to navigate tight spaces and activate switches, use DD to move heavy crates blocking paths. Solve puzzles in sequence, switching characters as needed. Progress through all chapters to reach the metropolis finale.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all puzzle chapters in order. Reach the final metropolis area and trigger the win condition (GAME_OVER_WIN). The game should acknowledge completion with a victory screen showing the discovered truth about humanity.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests interaction mechanics with objects like switches, crates, and doors. Validates that interactions produce expected state changes and unlock progression.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Approach interactive objects and use the Z key to interact. Test switch activation, crate pushing with DD, and door opening. Verify that interactions are only possible with the correct character and within interaction range.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Switches should toggle when interacted with. Crates should move when DD pushes them. Doors should open when conditions are met. Invalid interactions should be ignored without errors.
